basics.name: Haonan Wu
basics.headline: Frontend / Full-Stack Engineer
basics.visa: search job visa holder of Germany

experiences.summary:
Led the front-end team for a medical/orthodontic platform built with React, Redux Toolkit, Material UI, and Vite, owning planning, estimation, and on-time delivery of releases.

• Designed and implemented a component-driven architecture, improving code reuse and scalability by 40%.

• Integrated WebAssembly for 3D mesh computation, reducing rendering time from 1.2s to 700ms and significantly improving user experience.

• Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, increasing release frequency from bi-weekly to daily and improving deployment reliability.

• Defined and enforced coding standards, code review processes, and best practices; mentored junior developers and improved delivery efficiency by 25%.

• Collaborated with product management and UI/UX to translate requirements into technical solutions focused on usability and clinical workflows.

• Optimized core flows and initial load through code-splitting and asset optimization, achieving around 2% first-load improvement on critical paths.

• Managed post-launch maintenance, addressed user feedback, and iteratively improved performance, stability, and product experience.

Designed and developed scalable web and mobile applications using React, React Native, Redux, Redux Toolkit, and TypeScript.

• Built reusable UI components, custom hooks, and shared libraries to improve maintainability and shorten development timelines.

• Implemented predictable state management with Redux / Redux Toolkit, improving data flow clarity, performance, and consistency.

• Collaborated with backend engineers to integrate RESTful APIs and GraphQL, ensuring robust error handling and smooth user interactions.

• Optimized application performance through code splitting, lazy loading, memoization (React.memo, useCallback, useMemo), and bundle optimization.

• Split rendering, data, and UI control into independent modules to achieve high cohesion and low coupling, improving collaboration and testability.

• Participated in the full SDLC: requirements refinement, technical design, implementation, testing, and deployment.

• Conducted code reviews and mentored junior developers, promoting clean code and modern React patterns.

• Wrote unit and integration tests using Jest, React Testing Library, and Cypress to reduce regression risk and maintain release quality.

• Implemented FastAPI POST APIs with OAuth2 (Authorization Code), applied business logic processing, and forwarded requests to Java backend services via synchronous REST APIs.

Developed and maintained full-stack web applications using Java (Spring / Spring Boot) and AngularJS / ECharts, later introducing Vue.js for modern interfaces.

• Built RESTful APIs, optimized database queries, and ensured reliable data flow between front-end and backend services handling high-volume financial data.

• Implemented responsive UI components, state management, and reusable modules to improve maintainability and user experience.

• Participated in the complete SDLC: requirements analysis, solution design, implementation, testing, deployment, and maintenance.

• Wrote unit tests (JUnit / Karma / Jasmine) to ensure stability and reduce regressions; supported CI/CD and version control with Git.

• Delivered real-time trading visualization and analytics dashboards using Vue.js and Java (Spring Boot).
